zh.Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾利可 聖 路加
zh.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh於1050年出生在英國斯塔福爾利可 聖 路加。他和Mabella Stoneley至少有1個兒子。他去世於1130年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年80歲。

zh-hans.Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾利可 聖 路加
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh于1050年出生在英国斯塔福爾利可 聖 路加。他和Mabella Stoneley至少有1个儿子。他去世于1130年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Stanlegh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stanley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh was born in 1050, in Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, England. He had at least 1 son with Mabella Stoneley. He died in 1130, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh est né en 1050, à Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mabella Stoneley. Il est décédé en 1130, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh wurde 1050 in Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, England geboren. Er hatte mit Mabella Stoneley mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1130 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh è nato il nel 1050 nel Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mabella Stoneley. Morì nel 1130, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanleghは1050年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリーク スト ルクで生まれた。彼はMabella Stoneleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1130年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh(은)는 1050년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리크 스트 루크에서 태어났다. 그는 Mabella Stoneley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh nasceu em 1050, em Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mabella Stoneley. Ele faleceu em 1130, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh родился в 1050 г. в местности лик ст люк, стаффордшир, Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mabella Stoneley. Он умер в 1130 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh nació en 1050, en Leek St Luke, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mabella Stoneley. Murió en 1130, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
